entries.insight: Complexity is concentrated in the store layer (repository.ts, prep.ts, define.ts) — all three are accelerating hotspots. This cluster represents the core API surface and is the highest-risk area for regressions.
entries.context: First snapshot baseline. repository.ts: cyc 179, cog 124, 803 lines. prep.ts: cyc 59, cog 46. define.ts: cyc 56, cog 34. Fragility analysis confirms: store layer has 3 of top 7 fragile files, all accelerating.

entries.insight: No test coverage data is being collected. CRAP scores are static estimates only. Coverage tracking is the highest-leverage QA improvement available.
entries.context: All files show lineCoverage: null, branchCoverage: null in snapshot.

entries.insight: Test files account for 10 of 29 hotspots. repository.test.ts (cyc: 111, 858 lines) is itself a complexity risk — test helpers or shared fixtures could reduce this.
entries.context: First snapshot. Expected during active pre-1.0 test writing.
